Title: Create new page in Page Builder
Preconditions: Admin logged in; CMS module installed; Precondition gate passed (see test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md § Precondition Verification Gate)
Test_Data: PAGE-1 from test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md: Name=QA Homepage Spring Sale, Permalink=qa-homepage-spring-sale, Lang=EN
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
2. Click Add button
3. Enter page name: QA Homepage Spring Sale
4. Enter permalink: qa-homepage-spring-sale
5. Select language: English
6. Click Save
Assertions: Page appears in Draft list with correct name, permalink, and language; Draft counter increases by 1
Failure_Signals: Page not saved; validation error on name/permalink; page missing from Draft tab after save

Title: Edit created page
Preconditions: PAGE-1 created in CMS-001 exists in Draft status
Steps:
1. Open PAGE-1 (QA Homepage Spring Sale) from Draft list
2. Edit Name and Permalink fields
3. Click Save
Assertions: Updated name and permalink saved; page blade reflects changes; Modified date updated

Title: Preview page
Preconditions: Page exists with content

2. Click Preview

Title: Open page in designer (Builder)
Preconditions: Page exists; Builder configured
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Click Open Designer button

Title: Archive page
Preconditions: Page exists in Draft or Published status
Steps:
1. Open page
2. Click Archive button
3. Confirm

Title: Publish draft page
Preconditions: PAGE-1 exists in Draft status with blocks added via designer

1. Open PAGE-1 (QA Homepage Spring Sale) draft page
2. Click Publish button
Assertions: Page status changes to Published; page moves from Draft to Active tab; Draft counter −1, Active counter +1; page accessible at ${FRONT_URL}/qa-homepage-spring-sale

Title: Publish to Archive transition
Preconditions: Page is Published
Steps:

2. Click Archive

Title: Draft to Archive transition
Preconditions: Page is in Draft status
Steps:

2. Click Archive

Title: Status filter - Draft pages only
Preconditions: Seeded pages exist in various statuses (see test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md § Precondition Verification Gate); PageBuilder shell accessible
Test_Data: Seeded pages PAGE-2 through PAGE-5 from test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
2. Verify Draft counter badge in left sidebar shows correct count
3. Verify page list shows only pages with Draft status badge
Assertions: Draft counter matches total pages listed; all listed pages display Draft badge; grid columns: Name, Language, Permalink, Modified, Modified by, Status
Failure_Signals: Empty list or zero counter when draft pages exist in API; navigation to wrong admin path (Content > Pages shows file grid, NOT PageBuilder pages)

Title: Status filter - Active (Published) pages only
Preconditions: Published pages exist; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-active
2. Verify Active counter badge in left sidebar shows correct count
3. Verify page list shows only pages with Published status that are within their scheduled date range
Assertions: Active counter matches total pages listed; all listed pages display Published badge; pages may also show Scheduled and/or Personalized badges
Failure_Signals: Empty list or zero counter when published pages exist; navigation to wrong admin path (Content > Pages)

Title: Status filter - Pending (Scheduled) pages only
Preconditions: PAGE-4 (QA Summer Collection Preview) seeded with future StartDate; PageBuilder shell accessible
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-pending
2. Verify Pending section in left sidebar
3. Verify PAGE-4 appears in list with Published status and Scheduled badge
4. Verify page list shows only Published pages with StartDate in the future
Assertions: PAGE-4 visible in Pending tab with Published + Scheduled badges; Pending counter matches list total; if PAGE-4 StartDate has passed, it will NOT appear here (re-seed needed)
Failure_Signals: Empty list when pending pages exist; PAGE-4 missing despite future StartDate; navigation to wrong admin path (Content > Pages)

Title: Status filter - Archived pages only
Preconditions: Archived pages exist; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-archived
2. Verify Archived section in left sidebar
3. Verify page list shows only pages where all language versions are Archived, or pages past their EndDate
Assertions: Listed pages display Archived badge; pages past EndDate may also show Published+Scheduled badges; counter matches list total
Failure_Signals: Empty list when archived pages exist in API; navigation to wrong admin path (Content > Pages)

Title: Counters update when page status changes
Preconditions: Draft page exists; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
Steps:
1. Note Draft and Active counter badge values in left sidebar
2. Open a draft page and click Publish
3. Navigate back to Draft tab — verify counter decreased by 1
4. Click Active tab — verify counter increased by 1
Assertions: Draft counter decreases by 1 after publish; Active counter increases by 1; page appears in Active list with Published badge
Failure_Signals: Counters not updating after status change; page still appears in Draft list after publish

Title: Partial search match and case-insensitive search
Preconditions: Multiple pages exist; PageBuilder shell open at ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-all
Steps:
1. Navigate to All Pages tab in PageBuilder shell
2. Type partial page name in Search field (e.g. 'water')
3. Verify matching pages appear in filtered list
4. Clear and search with different case (e.g. 'WATER')
5. Verify same results (case-insensitive)
6. Clear and search with special characters (e.g. '&')
Assertions: Partial match returns pages containing search term; case-insensitive search returns identical results; special characters handled without errors
Failure_Signals: Search returns no results for valid partial match; case-sensitive filtering; UI error on special characters

2. Click on a published page to open its blade
3. Check that the frontend URL/permalink is displayed correctly
4. Verify permalink matches ${FRONT_URL}/<permalink>
Assertions: Frontend URL displayed in page blade matches the page permalink; URL is clickable or copyable
Failure_Signals: Frontend URL missing or showing incorrect domain

Title: Login and user profile in Page Builder admin

2. Verify user profile button in bottom-left shows username and role (e.g. 'admin / Administrator')
3. Check Virto Commerce logo display in top-left corner
Assertions: User profile shows logged-in user's name and role; Virto Commerce logo is visible
Failure_Signals: User profile missing or showing wrong user; logo not loading

Title: API — Languages and user-groups endpoints smoke
Preconditions: Admin authenticated via OAuth2 password grant (no client_id); PageBuilder module deployed
Steps:
1. [HTTP] GET ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder-pages/languages?storeId=B2B-store with Bearer token
2. [STATUS] Verify HTTP 200
3. [BODY] Verify JSON array with at least one language entry (e.g. en-US)
4. [HTTP] GET ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder-pages/user-groups with Bearer token
5. [STATUS] Verify HTTP 200
6. [BODY] Verify JSON array with at least one user group entry
Assertions: Both endpoints return 200; languages array contains en-US; user-groups array is non-empty
Failure_Signals: 401/403 unauthorized; empty arrays when data exists; malformed JSON; endpoint not found (404)

Title: API — Archive endpoint and publish-status check
Preconditions: Admin authenticated; test page exists in Draft or Published status
Steps:
1. [HTTP] POST ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder-pages/grouped/archive?ids={groupId} with Bearer token
2. [STATUS] Verify HTTP 204
3. [HTTP] GET ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder-pages/grouped/publish-status/{groupId} with Bearer token
4. [STATUS] Verify HTTP 200
5. [BODY] Verify response shows page is not published
6. [AUTH] Repeat POST /archive without Authorization header
7. [STATUS] Verify HTTP 401
Assertions: Archive returns 204; publish-status confirms archived state; unauthenticated request returns 401
Failure_Signals: Error code other than 204; status not updated after archive; anonymous access succeeds (security issue)

Title: API — Legacy /api/pagebuilder/* endpoints backward compatibility
Preconditions: Admin authenticated; PageBuilder module deployed with new and legacy endpoints
Steps:
1. [HTTP] GET ${BACK_URL}/api/pagebuilder/templates?storeId=B2B-store with Bearer token
2. [STATUS] Verify HTTP 200 (not 404 or 410)
3. [BODY] Verify valid JSON response (may be empty object {})
4. [HTTP] GET ${BACK_URL}/api/pagebuilder/sections?storeId=B2B-store with Bearer token
5. [STATUS] Verify HTTP 200
6. [BODY] Verify valid JSON with sections/blocks/objects/shared keys
Assertions: Legacy endpoints return 200 with valid JSON; no 404 (endpoints not removed); backward compatible for existing integrations
Failure_Signals: 404 (endpoint removed); 500 server error; HTML error page instead of JSON; endpoints return different structure than before

Title: Migration — MetadataFromContentMigrated platform setting is true
Preconditions: PageBuilder module v3.1001.0+ deployed; Hangfire migration job completed
Steps:
1. [HTTP] GET ${BACK_URL}/api/platform/settings/values/VirtoCommerce.PageBuilderModule.Migration.MetadataFromContentMigrated with Bearer token
2. [STATUS] Verify HTTP 200
3. [BODY] Verify response contains [true]
4. [ALT] Navigate to Admin > Platform > Settings and search for MetadataFromContentMigrated
Assertions: Setting exists with value=true; confirms one-time Hangfire migration ran successfully
Failure_Signals: Setting not found; value is false (migration did not run); setting absent entirely; Hangfire job failed silently

Title: Migration — Existing pages have scheduling and visibility data populated
Preconditions: MetadataFromContentMigrated=true; pages existed before module upgrade
Steps:
1. [HTTP] POST ${BACK_URL}/api/page-builder-pages/search with body {storeId: 'B2B-store', take: 5} and Bearer token
2. [BODY] Verify response results include startDate, endDate, visibility fields in schema
3. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-all
4. Open 3 pages from the list (prefer pages predating this upgrade)
5. Expand Scheduling section — verify StartDate/EndDate fields render without error
6. Expand Personalization section — verify Visibility, User groups, Organization fields render
7. Open DevTools Console — verify no errors while opening each page
Assertions: API response includes scheduling/visibility fields; pages open without errors; Scheduling and Personalization sections render correctly; all 20 sampled pages have visibility defined
Failure_Signals: API response missing fields; pages failing to open (500); Scheduling blank or throws exception; console errors on opening migrated pages

Title: Save content — download page content as JSON file
Preconditions: Admin logged in with PageBuilder Update permission; PAGE-1 or PAGE-2 exists with content blocks in Draft or Published status; DevTools Network tab open
Test_Data: PAGE-1 or PAGE-2 from test-data/cms/pagebuilder-pages.md; back_url={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
[BLADE] Wait for Draft page list to load
[ACT] Click on PAGE-1 (QA Homepage Spring Sale) to open page blade
[BLADE] Wait for page detail blade to open
[ASSERT] Verify toolbar contains 'Save content' button with download icon (material-download)
[ACT] Click 'Save content' toolbar button
[WAIT] File download dialog appears or file auto-downloads
[WAIT] Network tab shows GET /api/page-builder-pages/grouped/{groupId}/content?draft=true completes
[ASSERT] Verify green success toast notification appears: 'Content saved to file successfully'
Assertions:
[BLADE] 'Save content' button visible in page detail toolbar
[DOM] Downloaded file name follows pattern {page-name}-content.json
[FORM] Downloaded file contains valid JSON with page content/blocks
[NETWORK] GET .../content?draft=true returns HTTP 200 with JSON content-type
[TOAST] Green success notification: 'Content saved to file successfully' (vc-notification--success, top-center, auto-dismiss ~3s)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/page-builder-pages/grouped/{groupId}/content?draft=true returns 200
[BODY] Response body is valid JSON with page blocks
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during download
Failure_Signals: 'Save content' button missing from toolbar; download fails or hangs; empty file downloaded; file name incorrect; network error on GET request (4xx/5xx); console errors during download; no success toast shown after download

Title: Save content — button disabled for new unsaved page
Preconditions: Admin logged in; PageBuilder shell accessible
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
[BLADE] Wait for Draft page list to load
[ACT] Click 'Add' button to open new page blade
[BLADE] Wait for new page blade to open
[ASSERT] Verify 'Save content' toolbar button is present in toolbar
Assertions:
[BLADE] 'Save content' button is visible in page detail toolbar
[DOM] 'Save content' button is disabled (greyed out, aria-disabled=true or disabled attribute)
[DOM] Clicking 'Save content' button triggers no action (no download, no network request)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS errors when attempting to click disabled button
[NETWORK] No GET .../content requests fired when button is disabled
Failure_Signals: 'Save content' button is enabled on new page; clicking triggers download with empty/error content; console TypeError on click

Title: Load content — upload JSON file to create page from template
Preconditions: Admin logged in with PageBuilder Update permission; a valid page content JSON file available (exported via CMS-111); PageBuilder shell on Draft tab; DevTools Network tab open
Test_Data: Valid JSON file exported from CMS-111 (e.g., QA Homepage Spring Sale-content.json); back_url={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
[BLADE] Wait for Draft page list toolbar to render
[ASSERT] Verify toolbar contains 'Load content' button with upload icon (material-upload)
[ACT] Click 'Load content' toolbar button
[WAIT] File selection dialog opens
[ASSERT] Verify file dialog filter accepts .json files only
[ACT] Select the valid page content JSON file
[BLADE] Wait for PageDetails blade to open for new page creation
[ACT] Fill 'Name': QA Imported Page Test
[ACT] Fill 'Permalink': qa-imported-page-test
[ACT] Select language: English
[SAVE] Click 'Save' and wait for save confirmation
[WAIT] Network: POST /api/page-builder-pages/grouped completes (create), then POST .../content completes (upload)
[ACT] Open the created page in designer
[BLADE] Wait for designer to load
Assertions:
[TOAST] Success notification after save
[BLADE] Page blade shows name 'QA Imported Page Test' and permalink 'qa-imported-page-test'
[GRID] Page appears in Draft list with correct name and permalink
[DOM] Content blocks in designer match the source file (block count and types)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/page-builder-pages/grouped returns 200
[NETWORK] POST .../content returns 200
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during upload
[API] Content blocks in designer match source file
Failure_Signals: 'Load content' button missing from Draft toolbar; file dialog does not filter to .json; page saved without content; content blocks missing or corrupted in designer (4xx/5xx on content POST); console errors during upload
Cleanup: Archive QA Imported Page Test after test

Title: API — Copy page content endpoint
Preconditions: Admin authenticated via OAuth2 password grant; source page with content exists in Draft or Published status; empty target page (group) exists
Test_Data: sourceGroupId and targetGroupId UUIDs from existing pages; back_url={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[AUTH] Obtain Bearer token via POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/page-builder-pages/grouped/{targetGroupId}/content/{sourceGroupId} with Bearer token
[STATUS] Verify HTTP 204 (No Content)
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/page-builder-pages/grouped/{targetGroupId}/content?draft=true with Bearer token
[STATUS] Verify HTTP 200
[BODY] Verify target page content matches source page content (block count and types)
[AUTH] Repeat POST without Authorization header
[STATUS] Verify HTTP 401
[HTTP] POST with invalid sourceGroupId (non-existent UUID) with Bearer token
[STATUS] Verify HTTP 404
Assertions:
[STATUS] Copy endpoint returns 204 on success
[BODY] Target draft content matches source content (block structure identical)
[STATUS] Unauthenticated request returns 401
[STATUS] Invalid sourceGroupId returns 404
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[DB] GET target content after copy confirms data persisted
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during API calls
Failure_Signals: Copy returns error code other than 204; target content empty after copy; anonymous access succeeds (security issue — 401 not enforced); invalid IDs return 500 instead of 404

[ACT] Fill page name and permalink → Click 'Save' (if blade opened)
[WAIT] Observe result: page saves with empty content OR error shown
[ACT] Click 'Load content' again
[WAIT] File selection dialog opens
[ACT] Select malformed.json (invalid JSON syntax)
[WAIT] Observe result: error message shown OR graceful handling
[WAIT] Check browser console for errors in both cases
Assertions:
[DOM] System handles empty file gracefully: page may be created with no content blocks; no unhandled exception thrown
[TOAST] Malformed JSON shows user-facing error message or is rejected gracefully
[DOM] UI remains responsive after both invalid file attempts
[DOM] No corrupt page data persisted (designer shows empty or error state, not broken blocks)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions (TypeError, etc.) during either invalid file upload
[NETWORK] Server returns 400 or 200 (not 500) for invalid file content
Failure_Signals: Unhandled exception on invalid file; page created with corrupted content; UI becomes unresponsive/freezes; server returns 500 without user-facing error; console TypeError visible

Title: Auth — restricted user cannot save, load, or clone
Preconditions: Two admin accounts available: (1) admin with PageBuilder Update permission, (2) restricted user WITHOUT PageBuilder Update permission (e.g., Catalog Manager role or custom role without page-builder:update); DevTools Network tab open
Test_Data: Restricted user credentials from test-data/users/; back_url={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[AUTH] Log in as restricted user (without PageBuilder Update permission)
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
[BLADE] Wait for Draft page list to load
[ASSERT] Check if 'Load content' button is visible in toolbar — note state (hidden or disabled)
[ACT] Open an existing page from the list (if page list is accessible)
[BLADE] Wait for page detail blade to open
[ASSERT] Check 'Save content' button state — expect disabled or hidden
[ASSERT] Check 'Clone' button state — expect disabled or hidden
[ACT] Attempt to click 'Save content' if visible
[WAIT] Observe result — no download should occur
[ACT] Attempt to click 'Clone' if visible
[WAIT] Observe result — no clone should be created
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Save content' button is either hidden or disabled for restricted user
[DOM] 'Clone' button is either hidden or disabled for restricted user
[DOM] 'Load content' button is either hidden or disabled for restricted user
[DOM] No content download triggered; no clone page created; no file upload dialog opened
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS errors (no unhandled 403 in console)
[NETWORK] If any API call is attempted, server returns 403 (Forbidden) not 500
Failure_Signals: Restricted user can download content (data leak); restricted user can clone pages (unauthorized write); restricted user can upload content (unauthorized write); 500 instead of 403 on API calls

Title: API — Copy endpoint returns 403 for user with insufficient permissions
Preconditions: Two admin accounts: (1) admin with full permissions, (2) restricted user with valid auth token but WITHOUT PageBuilder Update permission; source and target group IDs available
Test_Data: Restricted user Bearer token; sourceGroupId and targetGroupId from existing pages; back_url={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[AUTH] Obtain Bearer token for restricted user via POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/page-builder-pages/grouped/{targetGroupId}/content/{sourceGroupId} with restricted user Bearer token
[STATUS] Verify HTTP 403 (Forbidden)
[AUTH] Obtain Bearer token for admin user (full permissions)
[HTTP] POST {{BACK_URL}}/api/page-builder-pages/grouped/{targetGroupId}/content/{sourceGroupId} with admin Bearer token
[STATUS] Verify HTTP 204 (No Content) — confirms endpoint works for authorized user
Assertions:
[STATUS] Restricted user receives 403 (Forbidden) on copy content endpoint
[STATUS] Admin user receives 204 (success) on same endpoint with same parameters
[BODY] 403 response does not leak internal error details or stack traces
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] No 500 errors — proper 403 handling
[CONSOLE] No unhandled exceptions
Failure_Signals: Restricted user receives 200/204 (unauthorized access to copy endpoint); 500 instead of 403; 401 instead of 403 for authenticated but unauthorized user; error response leaks internal details

Title: Clone permalink collision — page with '-copy' permalink already exists
Preconditions: Admin logged in; a page exists AND a clone of that page also exists (from CMS-116), so permalink '{original}-copy' is already taken
Test_Data: Original page + its clone from CMS-116 (e.g., 'QA Homepage Spring Sale' + 'QA Homepage Spring Sale (copy)' with permalink 'qa-homepage-spring-sale-copy'); back_url={{BACK_URL}}
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/apps/page-builder-shell/?storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id)#/page-builder-draft
[BLADE] Wait for Draft page list to load
[ACT] Open the ORIGINAL page (QA Homepage Spring Sale, NOT the copy)
[BLADE] Wait for page detail blade to open
[ACT] Click 'Clone' toolbar button — this will attempt to create a second clone with the same '-copy' permalink
[WAIT] Observe result: clone operation completes or error is shown
[ASSERT] Check if clone was created or if a permalink collision error occurred
Assertions:
[DOM] Either: (a) clone is created with a modified permalink to avoid collision (e.g., '-copy-1' or '-copy-2'), OR (b) clone is created with duplicate permalink '-copy' (server allows duplicates), OR (c) error message shown indicating permalink conflict
[FORM] If clone was created: verify name and content are correct regardless of permalink resolution
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Monitor for 409 (Conflict) or 400 (Bad Request) or 200 (success with duplicate)
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions during collision scenario
Failure_Signals: Unhandled 500 error on permalink collision; UI freezes or becomes unresponsive; clone created but page inaccessible due to permalink conflict; silent failure with no feedback to user
Cleanup: Archive any cloned pages after test
